title: Spicy Sizzling Ukrainian Chicken Stew
description: A juicy, spicy chicken stew packed with turmeric and sugar‑free dill pickles, perfect for a post‑workout meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the diced onion, carrot, and celery and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the turmeric, paprika, cayenne, salt, and pepper; cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the chicken cubes to the pot and brown on all sides, about 7 minutes.
Mix in the tomato paste, coating the chicken and vegetables evenly; cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the chicken stock, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Add the chopped pickles and lemon juice, and let the stew simmer uncovered for another 5 minutes to blend the flavors.
Stir in the fresh dill, adjust seasoning as needed, and if the stew feels too thin, simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes to reduce.
Serve hot over cauliflower rice or plain, optionally garnishing with extra dill.
Allow the stew to rest for 5 minutes before serving.
